normalization.notes: Store Vai syllabary text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Keep syllabograms as encoded units and do not decompose them into Latin transliteration in canonical text.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Vai syllabograms, syllable families, nasalized signs, word chunks, and reviewer-approved domain labels
segmentation.notes: Vai is a large living syllabary. Early lessons should teach selected high-payoff signs and reviewer-approved words rather than full chart order.

sources.notes: Vai code point metadata for syllabograms and punctuation. Use as infrastructure metadata only.
